Remarks/Remarques: Three segment curve representing section (low flow in culvert), channel (culvert filling), and overbank flow. There is a square edge on the right bank causing a narrow channel segment prior to the culvert. The lower end of the curve is more ambiguous due to dense vegetation and beaver damming in the channel. Discharge below 0.007m3/s is automatically graded as estimated. The range of stage covers 0.289m to 3.887m.
